objects.description: Eight small circles arranged around the perimeter of the yellow circle

choreography.description: The large yellow circle fades in with a grow-from-center effect. The eight small circles appear with a staggered fade-in around the perimeter.

The large yellow circle rotates continuously around its center axis. The eight small circles move along with the rotation, maintaining their positions on the perimeter. Use ease-in-out for smooth rotation.
The rotation slows down gradually. All circles fade out together with ease-in easing.
